hero.title: Apple Messages on this Mac
hero.lead: Search your texts in Braintunnel by copying a private snapshot from this Mac into your workspace. Data is used for your search index; you can disconnect anytime.

whatSyncs.afterStrong: is read locally and indexed so you can search and open threads in Braintunnel—similar to mail and folders in Search index.

permissions.betweenStrong: so Braintunnel can read the Messages database on this machine. If you use contact names in threads, the app may ask for
permissions.afterContactsStrong: to show familiar names—resolved on your Mac before anything is stored.
permissions.fdaDisabled: Full Disk Access is off or not detected. Turn it on in System Settings, then return here.
permissions.fdaEnabled: Full Disk Access looks enabled for this app.

technicalDetails.beforeStrong: Connections are revocable links between this workspace and a Braintunnel helper on your Mac. We do not show raw secrets after you leave this panel—use
technicalDetails.afterStrong: again if you need a new link.

setup.description: Paste this one-time code into the Braintunnel Mac helper when it asks. It is only shown here once—copy it now if you still need it.

activity.linkedAwaitingFirstSync: Linked {{value}} · waiting for first sync from this Mac

empty.noConnections: None yet. Turn on sync above to link this Mac.

errors.nameTooLong: Use a shorter name (120 characters max), or leave it blank.
errors.turnOnSync: Could not turn on Messages sync

confirm.disconnectDevice: Stop syncing from “{{label}}”? You can turn this on again later; Messages already copied stay in your workspace until you remove them separately.
confirm.wipeSyncedMessages: Remove all synced Messages data from Braintunnel in this workspace? This does not delete texts in Apple Messages.

status.removedFromIndex_one: Removed {{count}} synced conversation from the index.
status.removedFromIndex_other: Removed {{count}} synced conversations from the index.

remove.description: Clears Messages content Braintunnel has already copied into this workspace. Your Apple Messages app is unchanged.

refresh.driveBlockedTitle: Add at least one Drive folder in the list above before syncing

warnings.staleLock: A previous sync stopped unexpectedly. Quit Braintunnel completely and reopen to clear the stale lock.
warnings.needsBackfill: This account is configured but has no indexed mail yet. Run backfill (or refresh) to pull history.

status.backfillProgress: Indexed {{indexed}} of about {{target}} messages in this backfill…

summary.noMailboxRowSuffix: for this source id yet. After the first successful sync, counts and dates will appear here.

preferences.heading: This mailbox
preferences.description: Settings for this mailbox only — other accounts in your workspace are unaffected.
preferences.searchByDefaultDescription: When off, Braintunnel only searches this mailbox if you ask it to. It still gets indexed in the background.
preferences.sendByDefaultTitle: Send from this mailbox by default
preferences.sendByDefaultDescription: When you ask Braintunnel to send a message and don't name an account, it uses this one.

sync.description: Refresh pulls new mail for this account. Backfill re-downloads history for the window below (long-running).

actions.summarizeTitle: New chat: summarize all inbox items

compose.replyBodyPlaceholder: Write the reply text (this is saved as your draft)...
compose.forwardBodyPlaceholder: Write what to include with the forwarded message...

errors.notFound: Message not found. It may have been archived or the id is invalid. Try refreshing the inbox list.

empty.unavailable: Inbox unavailable — ripmail may not be configured.

empty.resultsExpired: Search results are no longer available. Run the search again to refresh this view.
empty.noMatches: No matching emails or indexed files.

empty.openFromAgent: Open a thread from the agent (get_message_thread) to view messages here.
empty.noMessagesInWindow: No messages in the current time window.

phoneAccessPanel.title: Connect Phone

lanDirect.title: Same-LAN direct (Wi-Fi)
lanDirect.enabledDescription: Phone can open Braintunnel on your LAN (vault login required)
lanDirect.disabledDescription: Block private LAN; use tunnel or this computer
lanDirect.hint: TLS-encrypted. Turn on only on networks you trust; the UI still requires your vault password.

phoneAccessPanel.scanInstructionPrefix: Scan this code with your phone to access Braintunnel

info.remoteAccessible: This link is accessible over the internet via a secure tunnel.
info.sameWifi: Ensure your phone is connected to the same Wi-Fi network as this computer.
info.localOnly: This link is only accessible within your local network.

confirm.resetMagicLink: This will invalidate your current remote link and all signed-in phones. Continue?
